title: P0-B Industry Batch 1 benchmark baseline
purpose: Provide a minimal but executable before-and-after baseline for the first 6 industry packs without turning evaluation into a new platform.
update_policy: Only update this manifest when the shipped hardening scope for Industry Batch 1 changes.
Do not overwrite historical QA evidence; benchmark scaffold records complement docs/16_qa_matrix.md.
Prefer adding or revising seed cases over expanding into a full scoring platform during P0-0.

cases.title: SaaS retention and pricing reset
cases.description: Recurring software business with churn pressure, onboarding drag, and packaging mismatch.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need a SaaS recommendation on ARR stability, churn, onboarding bottlenecks, and pricing/package redesign before scaling sales further.
notes: Should stay useful as the baseline case for SaaS pricing / retention hardening.

cases.title: Ecommerce channel and margin repair
cases.description: Commerce business with channel mix, SKU margin, inventory, and fulfillment pressure.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need an ecommerce operating review on SKU margins, repeat purchase, inventory turns, and whether to shift channel mix away from promotion-heavy marketplace dependence.

cases.title: Creator revenue mix and platform dependency
cases.description: Audience-led business balancing sponsorship, memberships, owned audience, and creator capacity.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need a creator business review on sponsorship concentration, audience monetization mix, owned audience conversion, and creator workload sustainability.

cases.title: Professional services utilization and scope control
cases.description: Service business with utilization, scope creep, founder dependency, and pricing pressure.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need a professional services recommendation on utilization, scope creep, founder dependency, and which service lines should be retained or repackaged.

cases.title: Online education completion and growth balance
cases.description: Education business balancing enrollment, completion, refund, and delivery quality.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need an online education diagnosis on learner completion, refund risk, enrollment conversion, and whether to simplify the course portfolio before scaling acquisition.
source_mix_summary: Course catalog and teaching capacity notes

cases.title: Gaming live-ops and payer economics
cases.description: Game business balancing retention, payer conversion, live-ops cadence, and UA economics.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need a gaming portfolio review on retention, payer conversion, live-ops cadence, and whether to delay bigger user acquisition until economics stabilize.
